calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 16, 2017 is admitted to probate. Norma Jean Rogers Jackson and Oscar J. Jackson, Jr. are appointed as the Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
